falsification_conditions.condition: The S&P 500 closes below the 200-day moving average for three consecutive trading days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A breakdown below this key trendline would indicate a continuation of the downtrend, invalidating the 'bottom' pattern expectation.

falsification_conditions.condition: The NYSE Advance-Decline Line falls below -500 for five consecutive trading days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: This would signal widespread bearish momentum across the market, contradicting the pattern's implied reversal scenario.

falsification_conditions.condition: The CBOE VIX index closes above 30 and remains above that level for seven consecutive days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Sustained extreme volatility would indicate market panic, undermining the stability required for a confirmed bottom pattern.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
